metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugin collection — cognitive scaffolding, planning, domain learning, and workflow tooling.

plugins.name: claude-settings
plugins.description: Personal Claude Code settings, skills, and hooks bundle.

plugins.name: planning-compass
plugins.description: Reduce cognitive overload during complex planning conversations with adaptive visualization and structured process interventions.

plugins.name: domain-xray
plugins.description: A cognitive-science-informed learning pipeline that helps you deeply understand any new domain — from orientation map through metacognitive priming and tacit knowledge generation to active verification.

plugins.name: git-worktree
plugins.description: Git worktree management skills: merge worktrees with structured commits, verify implementations, and maintain verification skills.

plugins.name: scaffold
plugins.description: Cognitive scaffolding for unfamiliar domains — triggered mid-conversation via /scaffold, delivers layered interactive onboarding with Context-First Delivery.
